title: How does Answer Engine Optimization differ from traditional search engine optimization?
answer: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) focuses on getting your content selected and cited as the direct answer inside AI answer engines and featured snippets, optimizing for a single best response. Traditional SEO focuses on ranking a clickable page link among the ten blue results, optimizing for keywords, backlinks, and click-through to your site.
